name: logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient maintenance scheduling causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking and scheduling via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient vehicle maintenance scheduling leading to unexpected breakdowns.
features: Notification system for maintenance due dates
